form.formComment: At debut, 2nd in a small field at Kembla Grange Super Mdn-Sw on March 3 over 1200m, on a wet track; 1.3 len behind Royal Silver with 57kg at $8. Won a Kembla Grange trial over 800m on March 31. Looks above average and with a bit of natural improvement can take this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). At debut, 2nd in a small field at Kembla Grange Super Mdn-Sw on March 3 over 1200m, on a wet track; 1.3 len behind Royal Silver with 57kg at $8. Won a Kembla Grange trial over 800m on March 31. Looks above average and with a bit of natural improvement can take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: After being slow to begin, shifted out and bumped Decota.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when 10th of 12 at Hawkesbury F&M Mdn-Sw on November 8 over 1400m, 7 len behind Pro Velocity with 58kg at $17. Will take great benefit from this run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Resuming after a break; only one run when 10th of 12 at Hawkesbury F&M Mdn-Sw on November 8 over 1400m, 7 len behind Pro Velocity with 58kg at $17. Will take great benefit from this run.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of four months. Finished off last preparation sixth of 8 at Murwillumbah Mdn-Sw December 12 over 1550m, 5.5 len behind Diosa with 57kg at $19. Previously first up; fifth of 9 at Gold Coast Poly Mdn-Sw November 29 over 1150m, 6 len behind Halfachance with 56.5kg at $13. Prefer to see how she returns.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6). Resuming after a break of four months. Finished off last preparation sixth of 8 at Murwillumbah Mdn-Sw December 12 over 1550m, 5.5 len behind Diosa with 57kg at $19. Previously first up; fifth of 9 at Gold Coast Poly Mdn-Sw November 29 over 1150m, 6 len behind Halfachance with 56.5kg at $13. Prefer to see how she returns.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly then bumped on several occasions.
Began awkwardly shifted in and bumped Bertus. Approaching the 900m, shifted in.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation fourth in a small field at Wyong Mdn-Sw October 30 over 1625m, 5.5 len behind Sir Loyne carrying 55kg at $26. On debut ninth of 11 at this track F&M Mdn-Sw September 20 over 1250m, 4 len behind Vexxy with 55.5kg at $41. Might find some of these a bit smart.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4.5). Resuming after a five-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation fourth in a small field at Wyong Mdn-Sw October 30 over 1625m, 5.5 len behind Sir Loyne carrying 55kg at $26. On debut ninth of 11 at this track F&M Mdn-Sw September 20 over 1250m, 4 len behind Vexxy with 55.5kg at $41. Might find some of these a bit smart.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last campaign fourth of 12 at Hawkesbury F&M Mdn-Sw November 8 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Pro Velocity carrying 56.5kg at $9.50. On debut fourth of 10 at Canberra Mdn October 24 over 1200m, soft track; 3 len behind Matchsticks carrying 55kg at $7.50. Expecting more this time in work.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last campaign fourth of 12 at Hawkesbury F&M Mdn-Sw November 8 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Pro Velocity carrying 56.5kg at $9.50. On debut fourth of 10 at Canberra Mdn October 24 over 1200m, soft track; 3 len behind Matchsticks carrying 55kg at $7.50. Expecting more this time in work.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and, shortly after, bumped by All Kirked Up.

form.formComment: Filly by Maurice facing the starter for the first time. Ran 3rd in a Beaumont (Newcastle) trial over 1000m on March 24. Worth consideration.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by Maurice facing the starter for the first time. Ran 3rd in a Beaumont (Newcastle) trial over 1000m on March 24. Worth consideration.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when 2nd of 10 at New Plymouth Raceway 3yo Mdn-Sw on November 21 over 1200m, 1.3 len behind Laura's Legacy carrying 55.5kg at $5.80. Everything points to a strong return to racing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Resumes from a spell after only one run when 2nd of 10 at New Plymouth Raceway 3yo Mdn-Sw on November 21 over 1200m, 1.3 len behind Laura's Legacy carrying 55.5kg at $5.80. Everything points to a strong return to racing.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start did the work up front then tired ran last of 7 at Wyong Mdn-Sw on November 16 over 1100m, 10 len behind Composed carrying 55.5kg at $7. Returned from break eased back early on 4th of 8 at Wyong Super 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1000m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Sir Les carrying 54kg at $14. Can improve and is not the roughest.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Second-up. First start did the work up front then tired ran last of 7 at Wyong Mdn-Sw on November 16 over 1100m, 10 len behind Composed carrying 55.5kg at $7. Returned from break eased back early on 4th of 8 at Wyong Super 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1000m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Sir Les carrying 54kg at $14. Can improve and is not the roughest.

form.formComment: Resuming after a three-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign ninth of 14 at Randwick 3yo Mdn December 26 over 1400m, 6 len behind Cellarmaster with 58kg at $14. On debut third of 8 at this track F&M Mdn November 1 over 1300m, soft track; 1.75 len behind Rosa Incanta carrying 57.5kg at $6. Progressive filly who looks all set for a bright return.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Resuming after a three-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign ninth of 14 at Randwick 3yo Mdn December 26 over 1400m, 6 len behind Cellarmaster with 58kg at $14. On debut third of 8 at this track F&M Mdn November 1 over 1300m, soft track; 1.75 len behind Rosa Incanta carrying 57.5kg at $6. Progressive filly who looks all set for a bright return.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 300m shifted out and made slight contact with Lontrice.

form.formComment: Filly by Russian Revolution on debut. Finished fifth in a Rosehill trial over 1030m on March 24. Fitter for recent trials and the stable can never be underestimated.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by Russian Revolution on debut. Finished fifth in a Rosehill trial over 1030m on March 24. Fitter for recent trials and the stable can never be underestimated.

form.formComment: Facing the starter for the first time. Three-year-old filly by Yes Yes Yes out of Starspangled. At the most recent trial finished tenth at Rosehill over 900m. Hasn't shown enough at this stage.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Facing the starter for the first time. Three-year-old filly by Yes Yes Yes out of Starspangled. At the most recent trial finished tenth at Rosehill over 900m. Hasn't shown enough at this stage.

form.formComment: Was at long odds at debut, 6th of 8 at Hawkesbury F&M Mdn on March 26 over 1100m, slow going 2.5 len behind Ascot Green with 58.5kg at $31. Looms as a serious contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(1). Was at long odds at debut, 6th of 8 at Hawkesbury F&M Mdn on March 26 over 1100m, slow going 2.5 len behind Ascot Green with 58.5kg at $31. Looms as a serious contender.

form.formComment: At debut, ran last of 11 at Muswellbrook Starmaker on March 27 over 1000m, slow going 8 len behind Hellenic Belle carrying 56kg at $20. Better for that experience but prefer to see her again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). At debut, ran last of 11 at Muswellbrook Starmaker on March 27 over 1000m, slow going 8 len behind Hellenic Belle carrying 56kg at $20. Better for that experience but prefer to see her again.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Was well-supported at debut, second last of 8 at Canberra Mdn on March 25 over 1000m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Pombia with 57kg at $2.90. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Dual acceptor. Was well-supported at debut, second last of 8 at Canberra Mdn on March 25 over 1000m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Pombia with 57kg at $2.90. Looking to others.
